meaning: adj.超自然的,神奇的n.超自然物,神奇人物,不可思议的事
examples: He writes short stories with a touch of the supernatural.
The second category of Norwegian folk tale is the supernatural.
Nor is it something that could be remedied by some supernatural power.
Narratives often centre on historical epics featuring dynastic royalty, concubines, deities and supernatural creatures.
He says the film comes at horror and the supernatural from a fresh perspective.
